introSection: Tornado is a steel inverted roller coaster located at Särkänniemi in Tampere, Pirkanmaa, Finland. Opened on 30 April 2001, it is the third full circuit inverted coaster to be made by Intamin. The ride has a heartline roll which passes over the enclosed station.
fullText:
Tornado is a steel inverted roller coaster located at Särkänniemi in Tampere, Pirkanmaa, Finland. Opened on 30 April 2001, it is the third full circuit inverted coaster to be made by Intamin. The ride has a heartline roll which passes over the enclosed station.



White track and green supports.
